title: More Beautiful Torches
description: The goal of More Beautiful Torches is to increase the decorative possibilities of the games, and for this, it currently adds more than 300 variants of torches.
body:
![MORE BEAUTIFUL TORCHES BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C341qvJ5/images/1ad9aab208ec4b68a8e29ce9a5f679b19927340f.webp) The goal of More Beautiful Torches is to increase the decorative possibilities of the games, and for this, it currently adds more than 300 variants of torches, with hopes of eventually getting themed variants for each element in the game. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![MORE BEAUTIFUL TORCHES SUMMARY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C341qvJ5/images/9362cf7d976a03c06f214558586f28879f298592.webp) This mod adds over 300 torches of different skins and formats, and we release regular updates increasing the number of variants available. As of today, the following versions are available: - Wood update. With this first version, players have available a dozen torches made exclusively of wood. (With the second version, new wooden torches have also been added.) - Stone update. With this second version, more than a hundred torches have been added that can be made with stone blocks or similar, such as minerals. - Redstone update. Introduced redstone variants of every torch type. - Soul Torch update. All variants of blue fire torches have been introduced. ![MORE BEAUTIFUL TORCHES F.A.Q](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C341qvJ5/images/6d258b99dcf07c9d0d858e72ab3f93324fb72a6c.webp) ### Is it compatible with other mods that modify torches in any way? We have tried to make it compatible with any Minecraft mod, and for example, in the case of installing "Danger Close", this mod will also be perfectly compatible with it. Also, you can request some extra compatibility and we will work on it. ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![MORE BEAUTIFUL TORCHES SCREENSHOTS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C341qvJ5/images/88390a14b3831985e553c74eda9b2264222dd961.webp) ![MORE BEAUTIFUL TORCHES IMAGE 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C341qvJ5/images/cf2018d256007ea34a5155f732447143194c2273.png) ![MORE BEAUTIFUL TORCHES IMAGE 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C341qvJ5/images/7b46bd6a73691d56199b3ec2f0212f66ab1cd2fd.png) ![MORE BEAUTIFUL TORCHES IMAGE 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C341qvJ5/images/82bd68c13aba2bd42a4ff599c997192c434f78da.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
